title: 🔥利好失效流动性枯竭
body: 市场处于无视利好的深度弱势。尽管以太坊基金会完成 69,500 ETH 质押，但 BMRI 升至 70 Risk_Off，显示宏观避险情绪完全压制了具体利好。BTC.D 维持 58.5%，资金仅在头部资产避险，未带动普涨。当前 AHR999 仅 0.33，低估状态难掩买盘匮乏。结论：偏空。谁来打破僵局？
body_en: The market is in a state of deep weakness, completely ignoring bullish news. Despite the Ethereum Foundation staking 69,500 ETH, BMRI has risen to 70 Risk_Off—macro risk-off sentiment is crushing specific catalysts. BTC.D holds at 58.5%; capital is seeking safety in top assets only, failing to trigger a broad rally. AHR999 sits at just 0.33. Undervalued status can't hide the lack of buy pressure. Verdict: Bearish. Who is going to break this stalemate?
